Qdrant.description: Qdrant vector store configuration for Umbraco AI semantic search.

DisableDefaultIndex.description: When true, suppresses the built-in 'UmbAI_Search' index registration so only explicitly configured category indexes are active.

ServerAddress.description: Hostname or IP address of the Qdrant server.

ServerPort.description: gRPC port of the Qdrant server.

UseHttps.description: Whether to connect to Qdrant over HTTPS.

ServerApiKey.description: API key for authenticating with the Qdrant server.

EmbeddingSize.description: Vector dimensionality used when creating Qdrant collections. Must match the embedding model output size.

RemoveOrphanedCollections.description: When true, deletes Qdrant collections that share the collection prefix but are no longer referenced by any configured category IndexAlias. Runs once at startup.

Categories.description: Named semantic search categories. Each key is a category name (e.g. 'Documentation').

additionalProperties.description: A semantic search category combining indexing rules and query behavior.

IndexAlias.description: Umbraco search index alias this category writes to and queries from.

EmbeddingsProfileAlias.description: Alias of the AI embeddings profile used to embed documents and queries.

TopK.description: Maximum number of vector matches requested before filtering and grouping.

Take.description: Maximum number of result documents returned for this category.

MinScore.description: Minimum cosine similarity score (0.0–1.0) for a result to be included.

ChunkSize.description: Optional chunk size override for all indexing rules in this category. Overrides the global ChunkSize but can be further overridden per indexing rule.

ChunkOverlap.description: Optional chunk overlap override for all indexing rules in this category. Overrides the global ChunkOverlap but can be further overridden per indexing rule.

Indexing.description: One or more indexing rules defining which document types to index and how.

DocumentTypeAliases.description: Umbraco document type aliases whose published content is indexed by this rule.

SearchText.description: Controls how document text is assembled for embedding.

MarkdownTemplate.description: Markdown template used to compose the document text sent to the embedding model. Supports {PropertyAlias} tokens, pipe-delimited fallbacks like {headline|Name}, dotted picker/block-list paths like {author.Name} or {technology.description}, optional trailing weights like {headline:2} or {categories.segments:5}, plus {Breadcrumb}, {Url}, and {ContentType}. Breadcrumb includes the content tree path to the content.

Chunking.description: Controls how document text is split into chunks before embedding.

UseHeadingAwareChunking.description: When true, chunks are split on Markdown headings to preserve semantic boundaries.

Context.description: Property aliases injected as context prefix into each chunk.

CategoryPropertyAliases.description: Property aliases whose values label the category/section of the page.

TitlePropertyAliases.description: Property aliases used as the page title in chunk context.

SectionTitlePropertyAliases.description: Property aliases used as the section subtitle in chunk context.

AdditionalPropertyAliases.description: Any additional property aliases to prepend to chunk context.
